title: Architecture View Specification
description: IEEE 42010-aligned specification for generating a software architecture view. Derived from the ArchView approach in the empirical study 'LLM-based Automated Architecture View Generation: Where Are We Now?' (https://arxiv.org/html/2603.21178). Required fields gate generation; recommended and optional fields improve quality. Use with PROMPT_TEMPLATES.md and INSTRUCTIONS.md.

summary.description: Textual architecture description extracted from source code or docs. Primary structural guide for the diagram.

Concern.description: What the view must visually emphasize.

Behavior.description: static -> component/deployment/package diagram; dynamic -> sequence/activity diagram; both -> component with annotations or two views.

Granularity.description: Abstraction level. low: 3-8 blocks; medium: 5-15 nodes; high: 8-20 nodes (no class-level explosion).

Architecture Scope.description: entire: full system; part: one subsystem/feature; entire+: full system plus contextual elements.

Architectural Notation.description: Drives output library: icons_and_arrows -> diagrams; boxes_and_arrows -> graphviz; UML -> plantuml; boxes -> graphviz/plantuml. Hybrids allowed; pick the dominant style for library selection.

Components Nature.description: Types of nodes to show (e.g., services, APIs, databases, classes, containers, actors).

Connectors Nature.description: Types of edges (e.g., REST, gRPC, message queue, function call, SQL, file I/O).

QAs.description: Quality attributes (ISO 25010-inspired) the view should suggest. Comma-separated allowed.

Colored?.description: Whether to color nodes by component type/technology.

Explicit Ports/Interfaces?.description: Whether to show explicit ports or interfaces.

Explicit Connectors?.description: Whether to label all connectors explicitly.

assumptions.description: Inferred defaults or self-resolved clarifications. Populated by the Metadata Assembler; surfaced in the final output.

questions.description: At most two batched clarification questions for genuinely ambiguous high-impact fields. A complete best-guess spec must still be produced so generation can proceed without answers.

examples.summary: Three-tier web app: React frontend, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL. Nginx reverse proxy. Redis for session cache.
examples.Components Nature: web server, API service, database, cache
assumptions: QAs inferred as performance_efficiency from caching layer

examples.summary: User submits order via API gateway. Order service validates, publishes to Kafka. Payment service processes async. Notification service sends confirmation.
examples.Components Nature: API gateway, order service, payment service, notification service, message broker
